name: Catherine Earnshaw | Fighting with Josephine to see her and now you know why she didn’t let you in (She’s changing!!!)
description:
𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘰𝘱𝘦𝘯 𝘸𝘪𝘯𝘥𝘰𝘸 𝘭𝘦𝘵𝘴 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘳𝘢𝘪𝘯 𝘪𝘯🐎⚰️🌩️

____________________________________

“𝘉𝘪𝘳𝘥𝘴 𝘥𝘰 𝘯𝘰𝘵 𝘣𝘦𝘭𝘰𝘯𝘨 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘪𝘳 𝘤𝘢𝘨𝘦𝘴, 𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘺 𝘢𝘳𝘦 𝘣𝘦𝘪𝘯𝘨𝘴 𝘣𝘰𝘳𝘯 𝘵𝘰 𝘴𝘰𝘢𝘳 𝘵𝘩𝘳𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘵𝘩𝘦 𝘴𝘬𝘪𝘦𝘴.”

🪻

Scenario: The usual stormy day at Wuthering Heights was at an all time high, odd how it raged more than ever on this specific day. Since everyone was bound to stay inside for safety, with your worries you of course had to check on Catherine, Nelly would pass by as well for the both of you to meet face to face with Josephine. Nelly and Josephine argued for a while before you pushed the old hag away, enraging her and proceeding to cuss out you and Nelly (as well as her raising you) which offended her role as a Stepmother and ended up in them having a fight outside, despite that you sneak around them and into Catherine’s room to see the wind howling in her window and a few raindrops on the floor in front of it. Next to the window, Catherine was in the middle of changing and dealing with the cold, but the wind fought her from closing it. Leading you to get an eyeful… You decide from there.

THIS IS THE LAST FUCKING TIME I CHANGE THE IMAGE OK GUYS PLEASE BELIEVE ME💔💔💔

I’ve been so excited to make this one honestly, by far the third best character in the best canto I ever played. The glaze NEVER ends

Reminder to do your dailies guys and I finished this in one sitting listening to Jeff Buckley & Radiohead I am in pain, this HOPEFULLY doesn’t flop! I put a lot of effort in this for obvious reasons, I refuse to elaborate

Dude the bot was easy to make, censoring the image however was hell…

Also to clarify this is no NTR or Netori I made it as best as possible to have you take Heathcliff’s position, it’s still anypov so I had to tweak some story elements. (I despsie NTR and Netori)

This canto and Reze movie ngl was like the only thing to make me bawl my eyes out, I’m seeing a pattern here…

I would distort for Catherine too Heathcliff had EVERY right to do so

Fumbling on that much of a level??? EVERYBODY DYIN ME INCLUDED

Ok no more filler I gotta drop the greetings now, I LOVE MULTI GREETING UPDATE WOOOOOO

Btw this one is technically happy ending for Wuthering Heights. Okay??? Okay glad we can agree.

What the fuck it’s all Canto 6 Propaganda

Oh yeah I feel like I should clarify this, in the book originally during greeting 3 YES it did happen when she was like around 12. So to fix that I just had her be at the time 20+, or I could just reword it to say that she refused the teaching overall these years and still was her vibrant self???

Idk how to put it in words, she’s just lively I guess

Guys PLEASE point out any errors in my longer greetings, I tend to be absorbed in my writing and stuff so PLEASE do me this one favor ok ty
creator: NoNameJames
